education: B.S. in Computer Science, University of California, Berkeley
coverLetter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am thrilled to submit my application for the Frontend Engineer position. With four years of experience building highly interactive, responsive user interfaces in React, I am confident I can contribute immediately to your product. I specialize in state management, animation, and performance tuning.

Thank you for your consideration,
Alexander Chen
resumeText:
# ALEXANDER CHEN
Frontend Engineer | Berkeley, CA | alexander.chen@example.com | (555) 234-5678

## SUMMARY
Highly motivated React developer with 4 years of professional experience building modern single-page applications. Passionate about custom animations, accessibility, and pixel-perfect responsive layouts.

## EXPERIENCE
### Senior Frontend Developer at AppVibe (2024 - Present)
- Led a team of 3 developers rebuilding a real-time analytics dashboard in React & TypeScript.
- Improved initial page load speed by 35% using lazy-loading and bundle splitting.
- Styled custom design systems using utility-first CSS frameworks.

### Software Engineer I at WebScale Inc (2022 - 2024)
- Scaled interactive consumer-facing applications to 100k+ daily active users.
- Built customized component libraries adhering to WCAG AA compliance.

## EDUCATION
- B.S. in Computer Science, UC Berkeley (2018 - 2022)

notes.text: Excellent technical interview. Answered React rendering lifecycle questions perfectly and designed a clean state machine for our coding exercise. Moving to the team fit round.
notes.author: Sarah Jenkins

notes.text: Very communicative, polite, and motivated. Highly recommends our culture.
notes.author: Sarah Jenkins

education: M.B.A., Stanford Graduate School of Business

resumeText:

notes.text: Splendid interview. Strong product sense, exceptional clarity on roadmapping, and very analytical. We extended an offer yesterday; waiting for signed contract.
notes.author: Sarah Jenkins

notes.author: Sarah Jenkins
